commands.review_summary:
The PR adds composer-draft mirror state and chat view regressions to suppress stale post-send input replays while allowing real same-text input and host prefills.

PR surface: Source +71, Tests +93. Total +164 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes, source-reproducible: current main clears the host draft after send, then a later input event can copy the submitted target.value back into the local mirror because handleInput has no stale-replay guard; I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next action is contributor or maintainer-supplied real browser proof, not a narrow ClawSweeper code repair.

target.title: fix(control-ui): clear stale composer replays after send
target.body:
## Summary

- After sending a message, the Control UI composer clears the draft. However, a stale `handleInput` event can replay the just-submitted text back into the textarea, making it appear as if the message was never sent.
- The fix tracks an `inputVersion` and `pendingClearedSubmittedDraft` in the composer draft mirror. After a send clears the host draft, a comparison detects and suppresses stale input replays that match the submitted text at the same input version.
- A real `InputEvent` (e.g. paste of the same text) is allowed through because it increments `inputVersion` before the stale-check.

## Verification

- Added three regression tests:
  - "ignores a stale input replay after send already cleared the host draft" — send + stale replay → textarea stays empty
  - "accepts same-text re-entry from a real InputEvent" — paste of same text after send → textarea accepts it
  - "accepts a later host prefill even when it matches the last submitted draft" — host sets draft to same text → textarea shows it
- All 87 existing chat view tests continue to pass.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Control UI textarea no longer shows the just-submitted message text after send clears it.

**Environment tested:** Node 22.x on Linux, jsdom via pnpm test.

**Steps run after the patch:** Ran the three new regression tests plus the full chat test suite.

**Evidence after fix:**

```text
$ pnpm test ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts -- -t "stale input replay|same-text re-entry|later host prefill"

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  3 passed | 84 skipped (87)
```

Before/after behavior (test assertions):

Before: textarea.value = "submitted message" after send + replay
After:  textarea.value = "" after send + replay (stale event suppressed)

**Observed result:** Stale input replays are suppressed; real InputEvents and host prefills still work correctly.

**Not tested:** Live browser Control UI with a real Gateway session. The fix is verified in jsdom; end-to-end browser proof requires a disposable Control UI/Gateway repro environment.
